text.message: Hey green, if I take the 9 10 without blocking the wood port will you trade me two wood 1:1s? 2:2 overall
Sure. Assuming you aren't going to immediately race for it lol
Also, materials of my choice to be clear
well all have to block green 24/7
I’ve been burned in the past with someone going back on that
You can place your first road but early two would be nice. I assume you will have a lot haha
do you want one now lol
Didn’t wanna make this a whole thing haha. Apologies fellas
nah ure good - its a good deal, just not good for blue or me
I will spread the love. Sorry
ive had a lot of love lol but i get it i guess
it is refreshing to have civilized ppl
I robbed red though green haha
u too strong with both ports
are you still asking for wood
figured that was the play lol but deal is a deal
but if u block me i get it
do i still get the wheat
so dont want to be mean on u
it was first for nb, then for ns
how could he give me a city with no ore prod
i mean thats clearly the right play
not sure if its right deal tho but i had to
and grain its hard on this board
i need lots of grain to win
and i was blocked on every of them
Blue when will you use the mono?
u should want me to take hahaha
get to 10 roads next turn green
i cant take anyway on close rows
no if it was mono, he would be waiting longer
so if he gets road he wins
They want a ten to roll and are trying to trade big mats
green has to get to 10 roads
what do you need for one more road
